transactions.desc: Carrasco cleared waivers Friday and elected free agency.
San Francisco designated Ramos for assignment on Friday, Shayna Rubin of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.
Atlanta recalled Waldrep from Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
Boston recalled Cheng from Triple-A Worcester and will start at shortstop against the Yankees on Friday, Mac Cerullo of the Boston Herald reports.
The Marlins optioned Norby to Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday.
The Marlins optioned Brzykcy to Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday.
The Marlins recalled Pauley from Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday.
The Marlins activated Meyer from the bereavement list Friday.
The Blue Jays recalled Macko from Triple-A Buffalo on Friday.
The Blue Jays designated Woods Richardson for assignment Friday.
The Brewers activated Koenig (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Friday, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.
The Guardians designated Fairchild for assignment Friday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals recalled Kent from Triple-A Rochester on Friday.
The Guardians selected Ingle's contract from Triple-A Columbus on Friday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Tigers claimed Diaz off waivers from the Diamondbacks on Friday, Nick Piecoro of The Arizona Republic reports.
The Royals recalled Spence from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The Pirates optioned Brannigan to Double-A Altoona on Friday.
The Mets optioned Melendez to Triple-A Syracuse on Friday.
The Mets optioned Duarte to Triple-A Syracuse on Friday.
The Mets recalled Thornton from Triple-A Syracuse on Friday.
The Mets activated Taylor (hip) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Reds recalled McCambley from Triple-A Louisville on Friday, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.
The White Sox recalled Sandlin from Triple-A Charlotte on Friday.
The Yankees activated Sanchez from the paternity leave list Friday.
The Cubs optioned Ferguson to Triple-A Iowa on Thursday.
The White Sox optioned Rock to Triple-A Charlotte on Thursday.
The Yankees optioned Escarra to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Thursday.
Varland was optioned to Triple-A Rochester after Thursday's 10-5 loss to the Phillies.
The Marlins outrighted Morel to Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday.
The Marlins optioned Brzykcy to Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.
